Validate a decoded D82 observe-event storage frame.

## Import

```ts
import { assertObserveEventFrame } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function assertObserveEventFrame(value: unknown): ObserveEventFrame<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `unknown` | Unknown value to check or decode. |

## Returns

The narrowed, validated value.

```ts
import { assertObserveEventFrame } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```
